blocked_when: request asks Streamlit to run workflows
request asks Streamlit to trigger Airflow
ready_when: surface only displays route, blocker, and review information
approval_gates.notes: The app may preview and recommend governed workflows, but must not execute them.

approval_gates.gate_title: Human Review Required Before Mutating Repo Files
blocked_when: workflow mutates repo files and no explicit human approval exists
ready_when: mutating workflow is run deliberately from local CLI or approved automation outside Streamlit
approval_gates.notes: Mutating workflows remain offline/manual and should not be hidden behind UI controls.

blocked_when: API key is missing for API-backed retrieval
request tries to store or print a key
request tries to write a populated secrets file
ready_when: RAG_STREAMLIT_OPENAI_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY is present in the local environment
approval_gates.notes: Only environment-variable presence classes may be surfaced; key values must never be displayed or persisted.

approval_gates.gate_title: Required Artifacts Must Exist Before Runtime Review
ready_when: required local artifact files exist and validation scripts pass
approval_gates.notes: Runtime review should fail honestly when artifacts are absent.

approval_gates.gate_title: Airflow Is Optional And Local/Dev Only
blocked_when: request treats Airflow scaffold as production deployment
request tries to trigger Airflow from Streamlit
ready_when: DAG scaffold imports safely whether Airflow is installed or missing
approval_gates.notes: Airflow support is a scaffold, not production infrastructure.

approval_gates.gate_title: Agent Shell Is Planning Preview Only
blocked_when: request is not in controlled catalog
ready_when: controlled request maps to existing workflow/task contracts and returns execution_allowed=false
approval_gates.notes: The agent shell may classify and preview only; it must not act autonomously.

approval_gates.gate_title: Public Truth Contract Must Remain Preserved
blocked_when: fallback is mislabeled as final model probability
ready_when: weighted XGBoost, threshold 0.29, artifact-backed runtime, and fallback separation remain explicit
approval_gates.notes: Truth/drift/fallback boundaries are not implementation details; they are governance constraints.
